name: LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington
description_short: LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington is a credit repair provider based in Kirkland, Washington. Rated 4.8/5 with 205 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington is a credit repair provider serving clients in Kirkland, Washington. With 205 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Kirkland, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Kirkland, Washington area who are considering LSI Credit Solutions - Seattle, Washington should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
